zh.lifeSummary: 當John Coffin於大約1475年出生在英國戴文阿爾文頓時，他的父親Richard Coffin37歲，母親Alice Gambon42歲。他於大約1490年與Elizabeth Phillippa Hingston在英國戴文比德福德結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1538年12月在英國戴文享年64歲，埋葬在英國戴文。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Coffin于大约1475年出生在英国戴文阿爾文頓时，他的父亲Richard Coffin37岁，母亲Alice Gambon42岁。他于大约1490年与Elizabeth Phillippa Hingston在英国戴文比德福德结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1538年12月在英国戴文享年64岁，埋葬在英国戴文。

nameMeanings.name: Coffin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southwestern England, of Norman origin) and French: nickname from Middle English cofin, coffin, Old French cof(f)in (from Late Latin cophinus, Greek kophinos) ‘container, basket; coffer, chest (for keeping treasures, documents, armour, etc.)’. Early bearers of this as a hereditary surname were of knightly rank. Old French cofin was synonymous with coffer, and it may be that Cofin was used to denote a keeper of the (royal) coffer, attested in Anglo-Latin cofferarius. Compare Coffer . The modern English word coffin is a specialized development of this term, not attested until the 16th century.
History: Tristram Coffin came from Brixham, Devon, to Haverhill, MA, before 1647. An important line of his descendants is associated with Nantucket and Martha's Vineyard.

variants.name: Coffer
meanings: English: metonymic occupational name from Middle English cofre, coffre, coffer ‘box, chest’ (from Old French cof(f)rehere), used to denote a box or coffer maker (Old French coffrier), perhaps also for a treasurer.
Probably also an Americanized form of German Kaufer or Kauffer.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Coffin was born about 1475, in Alwington, Devon, England, his father, Richard Coffin, was 37 and his mother, Alice Gambon, was 42. He married Elizabeth Phillippa Hingston about 1490, in Bideford, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. He died in December 1538, in Devon, England, at the age of 64, and was buried in Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Coffin est né environ 1475, à Alwington, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Richard Coffin, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Alice Gambon, avait 42 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Phillippa Hingston environ 1490, à Bideford, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en décembre 1538, à Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Coffin um 1475 in Alwington, Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Coffin 37 und seine Mutter Alice Gambon 42. Er hat um 1490 in Bideford, Devon, England Elizabeth Phillippa Hingston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb im Dezember 1538 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Devon, England und wurde in Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Coffin è nato il circa 1475 nel Alwington, Devon, England, il suo padre, Richard Coffin, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Alice Gambon, aveva 42 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Phillippa Hingston circa 1490, nel Bideford, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel dicembre 1538, nel Devon, England, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Coffinが約1475年にイギリスデボンアルウィントンで生まれた時，父Richard Coffinは37歳，母Alice Gambonは42歳であった。約1490年にイギリスデボンビデフォードでElizabeth Phillippa Hingstonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1538年12月にイギリスデボンで64歳で死去し，イギリスデボンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Coffin(이)가 대략 1475년 영국 데폰 알윙턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Coffin(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Gambon(은)는 42세였다. 그는 대략 1490년 영국 데폰 비데퍼드에서 Elizabeth Phillippa Hingston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1538년 12월 영국 데폰에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Coffin nasceu aproximadamente 1475, em Alwington, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Coffin, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Alice Gambon, tinha 42 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Phillippa Hingston aproximadamente 1490, em Bideford, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em dezembro de 1538, em Devon, Inglaterra, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Coffin родился около 1475 г. в местности алвингтон, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Coffin было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Gambon, 42. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Phillippa Hingston около 1490 г. в местности бидефорд, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер декабрь 1538 г. в местности девон, Англия в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности девон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Coffin nació aproximadamente 1475, en Alwington, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Coffin, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Alice Gambon, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Phillippa Hingston aproximadamente 1490, en Bideford, Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en diciembre de 1538, en Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Devon, Inglaterra.
